ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Overo scelta di tutte le Canzoni della Sicilia, Raccolte Da Pier Giuseppe Sanclemente, Et hora da Nicolo Mussuto in questa nova impressione accresciute, e riformate
ItacWorkItem.Notes: This text contains references to various Sicilian academicians. This is the second edition according to the printer Giuseppe Bisagni, in his dedication. The first edition appeared in ca 1645.
ItacWorkItem.CensorsAgreement: Imp. Ab. Gel. Vic. Gen. Imp. Domin. F. P.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
